meta.title: Contact — WAHM
meta.description: A question, a project, a partnership? Contact the World Academy of Human Movement team.

hero.label: Contact
hero.title: Let's talk about your project
hero.subtitle: A question, a partnership, a trainer application? Our team will get back to you.

info.responseNote: We usually reply within 48 business hours.

partnership.title: Talk to a partnership manager
partnership.text: Are you a trainer, school or institution? Let's build your presence on WAHM together.

coordonnees.title: Write to us
coordonnees.desc: We usually reply within 48 business hours.

coordonnees.title: Response time
coordonnees.desc: Our team handles every request with care.

form.label: Form
form.title: Send us a message
form.consent: By sending this message, you agree that your data may be used to process your request.

errors.invalid: Please fill in your name, a valid email and your message.
errors.failed: Sending failed. Please try again later.
errors.network: Sending failed. Check your connection and try again.

success.title: Message sent
success.text: Thank you for contacting us. Our team will get back to you within 48 business hours.
